name: Access to /etc/shadow or /etc/passwd for Credential Theft
description: Detects reading or copying of Linux credential files for offline cracking
query:
// Detect access to Linux credential files
// Trigger on cat, cp, or exfil of shadow/passwd
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(cat|cp|scp|rsync|tar|zip|base64)\s+.*/etc/(shadow|passwd|master\.passwd)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
